name: Technical Spec Writing
description: Generate a structured technical specification: problem statement, solution design, API contracts, data model, edge cases, and implementation plan.

outputs.name: problem_statement
outputs.description: Clear problem definition with scope, impact, and success criteria

outputs.name: solution_design
outputs.description: High-level solution approach with architecture decisions and trade-offs

outputs.name: api_contracts
outputs.description: API endpoint definitions with request/response schemas

outputs.name: data_model
outputs.description: Data entities, relationships, and storage decisions

outputs.name: edge_cases
outputs.description: Edge cases, failure modes, and handling strategies

outputs.name: implementation_plan
outputs.description: Phased implementation steps with effort estimates
